verses.text: Salsuahna panin a hong ciahkik mite in Israel Pasian Topa-a' dingin biakinn khat a lamna thu Judah leh Benjamin mite' galte in a zak uh ciangin

Zerubbabel, Jeshua, leh innkuan lutangte kiangah va pai-in amaute kiangah, “Biakinn lamna-ah ko zong hong kihelsak un; bang hang hiam cih leh note mah bangin ko zong na Pasian uh ka bia uh a, hih lai-ah kote hong koih Assiria kumpipa Esarhaddon' hun lai-a kipanin note' Pasian' tungah biakna ka pia uh hi,” a ci uh hi

Ahih hangin Zerubbabel leh Israel sunga innkuan lutang a omlaite in amaute kiangah, “Kote' Pasian-a' dingin ka lam uh biakinn pen note' hong lunghihmawhpih ding hilo hi. Persia kumpipa Sairas in kote hong thupiaksa bangin Israel Pasian, Topa-a' dingin ko teng guak mah in ka lam ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin tua gama teng midangte in Judah mite lungkiasakin biakinn a lam zomlai ding uh a lausak uh hi
Amau' ngimna a tangtun' theihlohna dingin amaute in a langpang dingin zum nasemte golhguk pia uh hi. Persia kumpipa Sairas' huna kipan kumpi Darias hun dong hih bangin hih ngitnget uh hi
Ahasueras in uk ding hong kipat ciangin Judah gam leh Jerusalem-a a tengte a khiatna thu tua gamah a na tengsate in lai-in a gelh uh hi
Tua ciangin Persia kumpi Artakzaksis hun ciangin Mithredath, Tabeel, leh a lawmte uh thukimna tawh kumpipa tungah lai gelh uh a, a lai pen Aram lai-in kigelh a, Aram pau mahin kisimkhia hi
Menzipipa Rehum leh lai-atpa Shimshai in Kumpi Artakzaksis tungah Jerusalem tawh kisai thu a nuai-a bangin gelh uh hi
Menzipipa Rehum, lai-at Shimshai, leh a lawmte khempeuh, thukhente, mangpite, thuvaante, uliante, Erek khuami leh Babylon khuami, Susa khua-a om Elam mite
leh a lian a minthang Ashurbanipal in hong puakhia-in Samaria khuapi-ah a hong ten'sak mite leh Eufratis Gun langkhat a kizawhna gamsunga a om mite tung panin lai puak, a ci uh hi
A lai sung thu hih a nuai-a bang ahi hi: “Artakzaksis Kumpipa tungah, Eufratis Gungal gama om na nasemte in hopihna kam kong puak uh hi

“Nangma kiang panin ko kiang-ah a hong pai Judah mite, tu-in Jerusalem-ah tung khin uh a, a gilo, mi lehdo thei ahi khuapi pen amaute in lamkikin, amaute in a khua bulpi vel khinin, kulhpi cian' a kipat khitna thu thei in
Amau' khuapi kilam kikin kulhte kizo leh amaute in siah ahi a, mangmu ahi a, losap ahi zongin hong pia nawnlo ding uh a, a tawpna-ah kumpi hong sukkhak ding thu thei in

Kote in kumpipa tawh thuciamna kip nei khin ka hih manun kumpipa' minsiatna ka muh ding uh kilawmlo hi. Tua ahih manin nangma mai-a a semte' thuciamtehna laibute a ki-etkik theihna dingin kumpipa tungah thu kong zasak uh hi. Thuciamtehna laibu sung en lecin hih khuapi pen a lehdo thei khuapi, kumpipa tung leh a ukna gamte tungah siatna a piangsak, kumpi dona a khuasungah a om tawntungna thu na mukhia ding hi. Hih khuapi a kisukcipna zong hih thu hang mah ahi hi
Hih khuapi kilam kikin a kulhte kizo khin leh Eufratis Gungal gam na uk nawnlohna ding thu, nangma tungah kong theikholsak uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in a lai uh hih bangin thuk hi: “Menzipipa Rehum, lai-atpa Shimshai, leh Samaria leh Eufratis Gungal gamsunga om na lawmte khempeuh uh tungah hopihna lai kong khak hi
“Keima tungah nong khak uh lai pen a kitel takin keima zakna-ah hong kisim khin hi
Keimah in hih thu a kikanna ding thu ka pia a, tu-in kikantel khinta hi. Tanglai-a kipanin hih khuapi pen kumpi langah pangin, hih khuasungah lehdona leh kumpi dona a om ngitngetna thu kimukhia hi
A vanglian kumpite in Jerusalem-ah uk ngei-in, Eufratis Gungal gambup tungah aana zang uh a, siah, mangmu, leh losapte tua kumpite tungah kipia hi
Tua ahih ciangin hih mite a nasep uh a khawlna ding thu pia in. Keimah in thu kong piakkik mateng hih khuapi kilamkik lo ding hi
Hih thu tawh kisai-in na sep ding donloin ommawk kei in. Tua hi kei leh kumpi tungah siatna leh gimna hong khang ding hi,” a ci hi
Menzipipa Rehum, lai-at Shimshai, leh amau' lawmte' zakna-ah Kumpi Artakzaksis tung panin a kingah lai a kisim ciangin, Jerusalem-ah amaute pai pahin Judah mite a nasep uh aana tawh a khawlsak uh hi
Tua huna kipanin Jerusalem-a om Pasian' biakinn a kisepna a khawl hi. Persia kumpi Darias' uk a kum nihna dong tua bangin a khawlcip phot hi.
